allow: Bash(node -e 'const { PrismaClient } = require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.event.findMany\({ select: { title: true, price: true }, orderBy: { date: '\\''asc'\\'' } }\).then\(e => { console.log\(JSON.stringify\(e, null, 2\)\); p.$disconnect\(\) }\)')
